title: How to Sell Ebooks from Kenya: Everything You Need to Get Started
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling digital products from Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, or Bangladesh is possible with crypto-native infrastructure that has no geographic restrictions.

content.text: As a digital creator in Kenya, you're likely tired of trying to sell ebooks through conventional payment platforms that constantly reject you due to geographic restrictions or KYC requirements. You've probably spent countless hours trying to figure out why your bank account isn't verified, or why your PayPal account has been frozen yet again. Meanwhile, your ebook collection sits untouched, a source of frustration and lost income. It's time to break free from these limitations and start selling your ebooks with ease. But where do you start?
Why This Method Works When Everything Else Fails

The beauty of using blockchain-based payments is that they bypass traditional banking systems and geographic restrictions, allowing you to receive payments directly from your customers. With services like NOWPayments and Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle, you can sell your ebooks to anyone, anywhere in the world, without having to worry about KYC requirements or frozen accounts. This method works because it uses blockchain technology to facilitate secure, peer-to-peer transactions that are free from the bottlenecks and restrictions of traditional payment systems.
What You Need Before You Start

To get started, you'll need a few key tools and pieces of information. First, you'll need to sign up for an account with NOWPayments, which will provide you with a unique payment address that your customers can use to send you payments. You'll also need to have a digital product ready to sell, such as an ebook or course. Finally, you'll need to have a platform to host your product, such as a website or landing page.
Setting Up Your Payment and Delivery Pipeline

Once you have your NOWPayments account set up and your digital product ready to sell, it's time to set up your payment and delivery pipeline. This involves configuring your NOWPayments account to receive payments in the cryptocurrency of your choice, as well as setting up a delivery system that will automatically send your product to your customers once payment has been received. With Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle, you can easily set up a payment and delivery pipeline that works seamlessly with your NOWPayments account.
You don't need to be an expert in blockchain technology to start selling ebooks and earning money.
Going Live and Making Your First Sale

With your payment and delivery pipeline set up, it's time to go live and start selling your ebooks. This involves promoting your product to potential customers and driving traffic to your website or landing page. Once you've made your first sale, you can start to scale your business by adding more products, marketing channels, and payment options. Don't be afraid to experiment and try new things - with blockchain-based payments, you have the flexibility to adapt your business to changing market conditions.
Scaling Once the System Is Running

Once you've got your payment and delivery pipeline set up and your first sale under your belt, it's time to start scaling your business. This involves adding more products, marketing channels, and payment options to increase your revenue and reach. With blockchain-based payments, you have the flexibility to adapt your business to changing market conditions, and to experiment with new products and services. Don't be afraid to think big and push the boundaries of what's possible - with the right tools and mindset, the sky's the limit.
How can creators in Africa sell digital products internationally?

The most practical path for creators in restricted countries is a combination of NOWPayments for payment processing and USDT on Tron for the primary payment coin. USDT is a stable coin pegged to the US dollar, which means your revenue does not fluctuate with crypto market movements. Tron network fees are under one dollar, and settlement takes under 60 seconds. Once you receive USDT in your wallet, you convert to local currency through P2P exchanges — Binance P2P, Paxful, or local platforms specific to your country. The conversion typically takes 20-30 minutes and costs 2-5% of the transaction, which is significantly less than PayPal's international transfer fees or Western Union's rates. This is the complete payment flow that thousands of creators in Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, and Bangladesh are using right now.
With NOWPayments and Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle, you can start selling your ebooks and other digital products in no time.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're interested in learning more about how to sell ebooks and other digital products with blockchain-based payments, be sure to check out our other resources, including our in-depth guides on using NOWPayments and setting up a payment and delivery pipeline. You can also join our community of digital creators and entrepreneurs who are using blockchain-based payments to build successful businesses.
Your Action Checklist

To get started, follow these concrete action steps: (1) Sign up for an account with NOWPayments and obtain your unique payment address. (2) Prepare your digital product, such as an ebook or course, and host it on a platform like a website or landing page. (3) Configure your NOWPayments account to receive payments in the cryptocurrency of your choice. (4) Set up a delivery system that will automatically send your product to your customers once payment has been received. (5) Promote your product to potential customers and drive traffic to your website or landing page.
Don't let geographic restrictions or KYC requirements hold you back from building a successful business - with blockchain-based payments, you can reach customers all over the world.
